server/tests/helpers.py :: bmp_bytes
def bmp_bytes(raster: Raster) -> bytes:
    import struct

    width = raster.width
    height = raster.height
    source = raster.to_rgb()
    stride = ((width * 3 + 3) // 4) * 4
    header_size = 40
    pixel_offset = 14 + header_size
    file_size = pixel_offset + stride * height
    header = bytearray()
    header.extend(b"BM")
    header.extend(struct.pack("<IHHI", file_size, 0, 0, pixel_offset))
    header.extend(struct.pack("<I", header_size))
    header.extend(struct.pack("<ii", width, height))
    header.extend(struct.pack("<HHIIIIII", 1, 24, 0, stride * height, 0, 0, 0, 0))
    pixels = bytearray()
    row = bytearray(stride)
    for y in range(height - 1, -1, -1):
        row[:] = b"\x00" * stride
        for x in range(width):
            index = (y * width + x) * 3
            offset = x * 3
            row[offset] = source.data[index + 2]
            row[offset + 1] = source.data[index + 1]
            row[offset + 2] = source.data[index]
        pixels.extend(row)
    return bytes(header) + bytes(pixels)
